sidebar.tagline: Main navigation for your financial workspace.
sidebar.mobileDescription: Navigate between dashboard, transactions, catalogs and profile.

onboarding.step1Desc: Your personal finance tracker. This takes a minute — you can skip it anytime.
onboarding.step2Desc: Track your accounts in USD, EUR or VES. Each one keeps its own balance, and Platica calculates the equivalent between currencies for you.
onboarding.step3Desc: Add income, expenses and transfers between accounts from the "New transaction" button. Cross-currency transfers use the day's BCV rate automatically.
onboarding.step4Desc: The "Rates" section shows the official USD, EUR and USDT history. Choose which currency you want your equivalences shown in with the $ / € / USDT toggle.
onboarding.step5Desc: Set budgets per category and track debts you owe or are owed — it all shows up on your Dashboard.
onboarding.step6Desc: The Dashboard sums it all up: cash flow, spending by category, and trends. You can replay this tour anytime from the "Help" button in the menu.

rates.title: Exchange Rates
rates.subtitle: Official Dollar, Euro and USDT, with daily history.
rates.fallbackNote: (latest available value, no rate for today)
rates.noData: No data for the selected range.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track your finances with clarity
dashboard.emptyTitle: You don't have any accounts yet
dashboard.emptyDescription: Create your first account to start logging transactions — the Dashboard fills up with charts automatically once you have activity.

filters.globalViewDesc: showing aggregated data from all accounts.
filters.accountViewDesc: showing data for the selected account only.

statistics.subtitle: Compare any two periods and spot trends in your finances.
statistics.presetLastYear: This month vs same month last year
statistics.pickBothRanges: Pick all four dates to compare.

savings.subtitle: Your savings accounts and goals, separate from day-to-day spending.
savings.empty: No savings accounts yet. Create one to start tracking a goal.

transactionsPage.title: Transactions
transactionsPage.subtitle: Manage movements, filter your history and explore the financial calendar from a dedicated route.
transactionsPage.listSubtitle: View and filter your daily movements

debts.title: Debts
debts.subtitle: Track what you owe and what others owe you. Log partial or full payments.
debts.linkCompletedDescription: {{count}} past transactions have been linked to this debt.
debts.confirmDeleteDescription: The debt with {{contactName}} will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
debts.selectAccountToPreview: Select an account to preview the final payment.
debts.enterValidAmountToPreview: Enter a valid amount to see the preview.
debts.enterValidDebitAmountToPreview: Enter a valid debit amount to calculate the preview.
debts.autoFillBcvHint: Auto-filled based on the BCV rate for the selected date; you can adjust it if you paid a different amount.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.description: Track recurring charges and manually confirm pending payments to avoid cash leaks.
subscriptions.editDescription: Edit the subscription details. You can pause it without deleting it.
subscriptions.createDescription: Set the billing rule, choose auto-pay or manual confirmation, and activate the recurrence.
subscriptions.howDoYouPay: How do you pay for this?
subscriptions.autoDescription: Platica will record it automatically every month (ideal for automatic debits).
subscriptions.reminderDescription: Platica will notify you to confirm the date, amount, and which account you paid from.
subscriptions.activeSubscriptionDescription: You can pause and reactivate it anytime.
subscriptions.amountMin: Amount must be greater than zero.
subscriptions.deleteDescriptionPrefix: The subscription will be permanently deleted
subscriptions.managementDescription: Activate, pause, or delete recurring rules. Manual ones create pending entries; auto-pay ones complete without intervention.
subscriptions.noneDescription: Create a subscription to start automating periodic charges.
subscriptions.paymentAlertsDescription: Manual transactions stay pending until you confirm the actual payment date.
subscriptions.pendingCountDescription: Confirm each transaction to move it from pending to completed and keep your metrics reliable.
subscriptions.noPendingDescription: Auto-pay charges are already marked completed automatically, and here you'll only see the ones that require manual confirmation.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.subtitle: Control your limits by category and spot in seconds when you're about to run out of room.

form.editDescription: Update the category, period, and amount of the selected budget.
form.createDescription: Set limits per period to control your spending by category.
form.amountPositive: The amount must be greater than zero.

period.label: Period
period.specificMonthRequired: The specific month is required for one-time budgets.
period.specificMonthFormat: The specific month must be in YYYY-MM format.

delete.title: Delete Budget
delete.descriptionWithCategory: The budget for {{category}} will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

list.emptyTitle: You don't have any active budgets yet
list.emptyDescription: Create your first budget to see alerts by category.

assign.title: Manage Categories
assign.descriptionWithGroup: Select the categories that will belong to the "{{group}}" group.
assign.descriptionGeneric: Select the categories for this group.
assign.emptyForType: You have no {{type}} categories available to assign.

delete.title: Delete Group
delete.description: This action cannot be undone. The group will no longer be available for new categories.

form.editDescription: Update the group's name, type, and analytics behavior.
form.createDescription: Create a group to classify categories and use it as a global filter.
form.name: Name

list.title: Category Groups
list.description: Manage groups to organize and filter categories across the dashboard.
list.empty: No groups created yet. Add your first group to get started.

calendar.title: Master Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Monthly projection of charges and payments with pending approvals in real time.

dayDashboard.title: Day Mini-Dashboard
dayDashboard.empty: There are no transactions for this day.

transactions.exportChooseFormat: Choose a format to download your transactions.
transactions.exportAllLabel: Export ALL transactions (server-side) instead of only the loaded items
transactions.exportNote: Note: if you check "Export ALL", all transactions are downloaded (via server) respecting filters. Otherwise, only the currently loaded ones.
transactions.arbitrageGain: Farming Aura! Gain detected: +{{gain}} VES (Approx +{{usd}} USD)
transactions.noTransactionsInCategory: No transactions available in this category.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.description: Create, adjust, and monitor your accounts from a dedicated view, without mixing navigation with the analytics dashboard.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Organize income and expenses from a centralized catalog with editing and assignment by category groups.
categories.createNewCategoryDesc: Add a new category to organize your transactions.
categories.nameRequiredDesc: Enter a name for the category.

brand.name: Platica
brand.descriptionLogin: Your finances clear, your goals within reach. Sign in and watch your empire grow.
brand.descriptionRegister: The first step to mastering your money starts here. It's simple, fast, and secure.

login.subtitleRegister: Sign up for free in seconds

validation.identifierRequired: Enter your username or email to continue.
validation.invalidEmail: That email doesn't look valid. Check the @.
validation.nameInvalidChars: The name can only contain letters and spaces.
validation.usernameInvalidChars: The username can only contain letters, numbers, . _ or -
validation.usernameTooShort: Your username must be at least 3 characters.
validation.identifierPlaceholderLogin: Enter your username or email address

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you instructions to reset access.
forgotPassword.errorDescription: An error occurred while sending the recovery email

resetPassword.title: Create new password
resetPassword.description: Enter and confirm your new password.
resetPassword.newPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
resetPassword.errorDescription: An error occurred while resetting the password

telegram.successDescription: Your Wallets account is now connected to Telegram
telegram.choiceTitle: How would you like to continue?
telegram.choiceDescription: We detected an active session. You can link it with WalletBot or switch accounts.
telegram.missingChatIdDescription: Go back to the bot to generate the correct link.

unlinkGoogle.title: Unlink Google
unlinkGoogle.description: Set a password to continue with local authentication.

emailChange.title: Change email
emailChange.description: Complete the OTP security flow to update your email.

profileEdit.googleLinkedDescription: You signed in with Google. To change your email, you must first create a password.

errors.missingRegisterFields: Fill in username, email, and password.
errors.missingLoginCredentials: Enter your username or email and your password.
errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Check your username/email and password.
errors.userExists: That username or email is already registered.
errors.nameTooShort: Your name must be at least 3 characters.
errors.emailInvalidGeneric: Invalid email. Use a valid format without special characters.
errors.passwordTooShort: The password is too short (minimum 6 characters).
errors.identifierConflict: Enter only username or email, not both.
errors.googleTokenInvalidOrExpired: The Google token is invalid or expired.
errors.googleTokenNoEmail: Google didn't provide a valid email.
errors.notFound: We couldn't find an account with that information.
errors.generic: Oops, something went wrong. Please try again.
